summary: Use pwsh, enforce lockfile integrity guard, run build with release projectDir

summary: Centralized release packaging config with deterministic file mappings
reason: Align build artifacts with runtime expectations

summary: Removed from release flow and repository changeset
reason: Eliminate fake integrity placeholders and release-local dependency churn

summary: Reduced to metadata-only release app manifest
reason: Keep builder metadata clean and avoid duplicated build configuration

summary: Standardized changelog using Keep a Changelog structure
reason: Improve clarity, traceability, and AI-friendly updates

summary: Added audit report and folder guidance
reason: Establish evidence trail for release and CI fixes

summary: Added fast AI navigation entrypoint
reason: Reduce time-to-context for automated maintenance

summary: Added changelog maintenance skill with hooks and slash command
reason: Enable repeatable AI-driven changelog workflows

summary: Added selectedProviderId state for chat AI provider selection
reason: Enable per-chat provider/model selection UI

reason: Support routing chat requests to configured provider/model

reason: Surface connected provider/model and allow user selection

summary: Added bootstrap.cmd launcher to run bootstrap.ps1 with auto-elevation and ExecutionPolicy Bypass
reason: Prevent Mark-of-the-Web and execution policy blocks from breaking first-run setup

summary: Added companion script sync (copy/download) and Mode gating for CheckOnly/InstallOnly
reason: Make bootstrap resilient when scripts are missing and support safe preflight-only runs

summary: Removed iex-based elevation path; added file-based relaunch and pwsh-compatible web requests
reason: Avoid unsafe pipe-to-iex patterns and improve compatibility across PowerShell versions

summary: Updated download options and one-liner to use bootstrap.cmd instead of pipe-to-iex
reason: Ensure install/download guidance works under default Windows execution policy indefinitely

summary: Added bootstrap.cmd to scripts list and updated how-to guidance away from Set-ExecutionPolicy
reason: Keep setup flow working without changing system-wide execution policy settings

summary: Replaced external pipe-to-iex command with official bootstrap.cmd CheckOnly command
reason: Keep scans functional without unsafe execution patterns

summary: Default bootstrap.cmd to Preflight (CheckOnly) when no args provided
reason: Make safe preflight the default path instead of accidental full install

summary: Print clear Preflight banner when running in CheckOnly
reason: Make CheckOnly mode obvious during runs and in logs

summary: Updated one-liner to run Preflight (CheckOnly) by default
reason: Ensure the fastest install path starts with a safe preflight

summary: Updated how-to steps to explicitly call out Preflight first
reason: Make recommended flow preflight-first and reduce user mistakes

summary: Updated copy to identify Preflight/CheckOnly as safe scan mode
reason: Align UI language with preflight-first workflow

summary: Documented that bootstrap.cmd defaults to Preflight (CheckOnly)
reason: Keep docs aligned with durable launcher behavior

summary: Added Preflight/Install notes for bootstrap.cmd to settings checklist
reason: Make baseline setup guidance match preflight-first path

summary: Default VHDX path under WorkspaceDir when not provided and create WSL dir from VhdxPath
reason: Keep all mutable state under the chosen workspace drive and avoid unexpected C:\\Users\\<user>\\WSL folders

summary: Skip restore point in CheckOnly and block Full/InstallOnly until SecurityCheck reports readyToInstall
reason: Make preflight safe and prevent partial installs when prerequisites are not met

summary: Add wslReady check, readyToInstall flag, and broader -Fix behavior for WSL and Windows Update
reason: Make preflight output actionable and allow bootstrap to safely gate installs
